params.context: CRITICAL FIX based on #527 DevTools diagnostic: Chrome received 0 bytes from APF envelope. Root cause: h2_end_stream=2 (delayed END_STREAM) allows RST_STREAM to arrive FIRST, causing Chrome to discard all response data. Fix: h2_end_stream=1 (END_STREAM on DATA frame immediately). Previous #520 with h2_end_stream=1 confirmed bytes DID reach browser (just wrong format). Now with correct v4 format (1148B), bytes should both arrive AND parse correctly. h2_mode=2, h2_end_stream=1.

check_details.key_hypothesis: h2_end_stream=2 delays END_STREAM 10ms → RST_STREAM arrives first → Chrome discards body (0 bytes). h2_end_stream=1 includes END_STREAM with DATA → Chrome reads body before RST_STREAM.
check_details.prior_evidence: #520 h2_end_stream=1 delivered bytes (wrong format). #527 DevTools confirmed 0 bytes with h2_end_stream=2.
